issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases such as misconfiguration or IPv6 support.
Skill is Linux-only and does not support other operating systems.

scenarios.name: SSH-safe basic iptables firewall
scenarios.rationale: Treatment establishes conntrack ESTABLISHED,RELATED accept before dropping, allows lo, opens 22/80/443, sets DROP policy, and persists with iptables-save to /etc/iptables/rules.v4; baseline covers the basic ACCEPT/DROP but commonly omits the conntrack-before-policy ordering.

scenarios.name: UFW with PostgreSQL restricted to 10.0.0.0/8
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact ufw default deny/allow, allow ssh, 80/tcp, 443/tcp, and ufw allow from 10.0.0.0/8 to any port 5432 pattern; baseline often forgets the from-CIDR-to-port syntax or omits ufw enable.
